mapper.select:
select ri.*,su.real_name as real_name,rc.classify_name as classify_name from report_index ri LEFT JOIN sys_user su on ri.create_user_id = su.user_id left join report_classify rc on ri.classify_id = rc.classify_id where 1=1
and ri.index_name like "%"#{reportIndex.indexName}"%"
and (ri.parent_id =#{reportIndex.parentId})
and (ri.is_query =#{reportIndex.isQuery})
and (ri.index_id =#{reportIndex.indexId})
or ri.parent_id=0
order by ri.sort_id asc,ri.create_time desc

select ri.*,su.real_name as real_name,rc.classify_name as classify_name from report_index ri LEFT JOIN sys_user su on ri.create_user_id = su.user_id left join report_classify rc on ri.classify_id = rc.classify_id where 1=1
and ri.index_name like "%"#{reportIndex.indexName}"%"
and (ri.parent_id =#{reportIndex.parentId})
and (ri.is_query =#{reportIndex.isQuery})
and (ri.index_id =#{reportIndex.indexId})
or ri.parent_id=0
order by ri.sort_id asc,ri.create_time desc

select ri.*,su.real_name as real_name,rc.classify_name as classify_name from report_index ri LEFT JOIN sys_user su on ri.create_user_id = su.user_id left join report_classify rc on ri.classify_id = rc.classify_id where 1=1
and ri.index_name like "%"#{reportIndex.indexName}"%"
and (ri.parent_id =#{reportIndex.parentId})
and (ri.is_query =#{reportIndex.isQuery})
and (ri.index_id =#{reportIndex.indexId})
order by ri.sort_id asc,ri.create_time desc
mapper.update:
update report_index
index_type = #{reportIndex.indexType},
data_cycle = #{reportIndex.dataCycle},
anal_role = #{reportIndex.analRole},
is_include_no_stand = #{reportIndex.isIncludeNoStand},
is_five_inten = #{reportIndex.isFiveInten},
table_name = #{reportIndex.tableName},
create_time = sysdate() where parent_id = #{reportIndex.indexId}
